name: Claude Code Skills and Agent Plugins
description: A collection of 220+ ready-to-use skills and agent plugins designed for various coding agents including Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and others, supporting functionalities in engineering, marketing, product management, compliance, and executive advisory.

inputs.name: agent_name
inputs.description: The name of the coding agent to integrate with (e.g., Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI).

inputs.name: skill_query
inputs.description: A request or command specifying the desired skill or operation to perform.

inputs.name: context_data
inputs.description: Contextual information or environment data the skill/plugin uses for processing.

inputs.name: input_parameters
inputs.description: Specific parameters or data inputs specific to each skill/plugin.

outputs.name: skill_output
outputs.description: The result or response generated by the invoked skill or plugin.

outputs.name: execution_status
outputs.description: Indicates success, failure, or error details from running the skill/plugin.

patterns: Modular skill/plugin architecture for extensible agent capabilities
Agent-agnostic interface supporting multiple coding assistants
Domain-specific skill categorization (engineering, marketing, product, compliance, executive advisory)
Standardized input/output schema for seamless integration
Reusable prompt templates tailored for different agent platforms
steps: Select the target coding agent for integration (e.g., Claude Code, Codex)
Identify the required skill or plugin based on the task domain
Provide necessary input parameters and context data to the selected skill
Invoke the skill/plugin through the agent interface
Receive and process the output or response from the skill execution
Handle status updates or errors and iterate if needed
use_cases: Enhancing coding assistants with specialized capabilities across diverse domains
Automating engineering tasks, marketing strategies, product decisions, and compliance checks through AI agents
Providing C-level executive advisory support via coding agents
Integrating multiple AI coding platforms with uniform skills for consistent developer experience
Rapid prototyping and deployment of agent plugins for new AI coding assistants

prompt_templates.name: skill_invocation
prompt_templates.template: Execute the {skill_name} skill on agent {agent_name} using the following parameters: {input_parameters}

prompt_templates.name: marketing_strategy_generation
prompt_templates.template: Generate a comprehensive marketing strategy for {product_name} targeting {audience} leveraging agent {agent_name}'s capabilities.

prompt_templates.name: engineering_task_automation
prompt_templates.template: Automate the engineering task: {task_description} using the {skill_name} plugin on {agent_name}.

prompt_templates.name: compliance_check
prompt_templates.template: Perform a compliance check on {document} using the compliance skill for agent {agent_name}.

prompt_templates.name: c_level_advisory
prompt_templates.template: Provide executive advisory recommendations regarding {business_issue} using agent {agent_name}.
